2605.07705.title: Cross-Attention and Encoder-Decoder Transformers: A Logical Characterization
2605.07705.paper_summary: We give a novel logical characterization of encoder-decoder transformers, the foundational architecture for LLMs that also sees use in various settings that benefit from cross-attention. We study such transformers over text in the practical setting of floating-point numbers and soft-attention, characterizing them with a new temporal logic. This logic extends propositional logic with a counting global modality over the encoder input and a past modality over the decoder input. We also give an additional characterization of such transformers via a type of distributed automata, and show that our results are not limited to the specific choices in the architecture and can account for changes in, e.g., masking. Finally, we discuss encoder-decoder transformers in the autoregressive setting.
2605.07705.paper_summary_zh: 我們給出了一種新穎的邏輯特徵來描述編碼器-解碼器Transformer，這是大型語言模型的基礎架構，也在各種受益於交叉注意力的設置中使用。<lb/>我們在浮點數和軟注意力的實際環境中研究這些Transformer，並用一種新的時間邏輯來描述它們。<lb/>這種邏輯擴展了命題邏輯，增加了對編碼器輸入的計數全局模態和對解碼器輸入的過去模態。<lb/>我們還通過一種分佈式自動機的類型對這些Transformer進行了額外的特徵描述，並顯示我們的結果並不僅限於架構中的特定選擇，還可以解釋例如遮罩的變化。<lb/>最後，我們討論了自回歸設置中的編碼器-解碼器Transformer。
2605.07705.author: Veeti Ahvonen et.al.
2605.07705.authors: Veeti Ahvonen, Damian Heiman, Antti Kuusisto, Miguel Moreno, Matias Selin
